chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 40 of 2024 (M/s. BankIslami Pakistan Ltd Vs. Muhammad Usman & 4 others) High Court Appeal No. 41 of 2024 (M/s. BankIslami Pakistan Ltd Vs. Mst. Surraiya Bibi & 4 others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Omar Sial H.C.A. No. 40 of 2024 Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 208/2024 (stay) H.C.A. No. 41 of 2024 Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 211/2024 (stay) Dated 31.01.2024 Mr. Faiz Durrani, Advocate for the Appellants Mr. Farrukh Usman Advocate for the Respondent No.1 Mr. Faisal Rafiq Advocate for the Respondent No.2..-.-.-.-.-. All learned counsels have agreed to the disposal of these appeals that an appropriate issue that concerns with the ownership of the Appellants be framed. Accordingly, the following issue is framed for a trial before learned Single Judge:- “Whether the answering Defendant is at present or at the time of accident was the owner/registered owner of the said vehicle, which caused the accident?” With this additional issue the evidence be recorded by the parties and judgment be announced. These appeals along with listed applications are disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
